description: Single source of truth for the energy / fitness / fatigue / injury subsystem. All consumers (EnergyManager, gameStore, playerStore, MatchEngine) read from this file — no hardcoded values in code.

perBallFaced.description: Energy lost per ball faced, scaled by stamina

perRunTaken.description: Energy lost per run between wickets, scaled by stamina

perBallFielded.description: Energy lost per ball fielded, scaled by stamina

perCatchAttempt.description: Energy lost per catch taken or dropped, scaled by stamina

staminaScaling.description: Energy depletion is reduced by factorPerPoint per stamina point (default: 1% per stamina point)
staminaScaling.example: Player with stamina=10 loses 0.9 energy instead of 1.0 per action

cap.description: Universal fitness ceiling — used for both initial fitness (playerStore.initializeAllPlayerConditions) and daily rest-day recovery (gameStore advanceDay).

recoveryRule.description: On each rest day (non-match), fitness += player.attributes.physical.endurance, capped at fitness.cap. Paused while injured.

fatigueIncrease.description: After each match, fatigue increases probabilistically based on energy depletion
fatigueIncrease.example: If energy=40 at match end, 60% chance fatigue increases by 1

fatigueRecovery.description: Fatigue recovery kicks in on rest day >= startDay. Recovers baseRecoveryPerDay/day, plus bonusAmount every bonusInterval-th rest day (gated by startDay).
fatigueRecovery.example: With startDay=6, bonusInterval=7: base recovery from day 6; first bonus on day 7, then day 14, 21, ...

injuryTrigger.description: On match finalize, injury rolls with probability = fatigue/100; duration is inverse-linear weighted (shorter injuries more likely)

injurySeverity.description: Severity classification by duration: <= minorMaxDuration => 'minor'; <= majorMaxDuration => 'major'; else 'severe'

limits.description: Energy and fatigue cannot exceed 0-100 range
